name: @seaturtle/ct
author: SeaTurtle CLI
description: Use CT, SeaTurtle CLI's terminal assistant, right from your shell. CT can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.AUTHORIZED) { console.error('ERROR: Direct publishing is not allowed.\nPlease see the release workflow documentation to publish this package.'); process.exit(1); }"
